events.action: Raid this boss during its one-hour Raid Hour window.
events.name: Solgaleo Raid Hour

events.action: Catch Eevee during the hour for 2× Catch Candy.
events.name: Eevee Spotlight Hour

events.action: Battle this Dynamax boss at a Power Spot during the window.
events.name: Dynamax Feebas during Max Monday

events.action: Raid this boss during its one-hour Raid Hour window.
events.name: Kyurem Raid Hour

events.action: Catch Bidoof during the hour for 2× Transfer Candy.
events.name: Bidoof Spotlight Hour

events.action: Battle this Gigantamax boss at a Power Spot during the window.
events.name: Gigantamax Rillaboom Max Battle Day

events.action: Catch Nickit outdoors during the event for Community Day bonuses.
events.name: Nickit Community Day

currentEvents.note: Synced from ScrapedDuck (github.com/bigfoott/ScrapedDuck), a maintained LeekDuck.com mirror, via scripts/sync-rotation.mjs. Spotlight Hour, Community Day, Raid Hour, Max Battle, and Max Monday events only. OPERATOR: re-run the sync script to refresh, then rebuild (PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pogo_encyclopedia.assemble). Unknown formIds fail the build loudly by design.
